name: Compiled Obsidian Energy Metering Knowledge Base

entries.name: ABNT NBR 14519
entries.definition: Brazilian standard referenced for electronic meter interface characteristics such as optical communication.

entries.name: ABNT NBR 14522
entries.definition: Brazilian standard commonly referenced for electronic energy meter communication and data handling.

entries.name: Active Energy
entries.definition: Measured active energy, usually expressed in Wh or kWh.

entries.name: Activity Calendar
entries.definition: Calendar and special day configuration used for tariff periods and billing behavior.

entries.name: AES-GCM
entries.definition: Authenticated encryption algorithm referenced in DLMS/COSEM security suites.

entries.name: Alarm
entries.definition: Meter indication for abnormal conditions that may need attention.

entries.name: Association
entries.definition: Logical connection between a DLMS/COSEM client and server with defined access rights and security level.

entries.name: Billing Profile
entries.definition: Profile storing metering quantities related to billing periods.

entries.name: Blue Book Part 1 OBIS
entries.definition: DLMS UA Blue Book Part 1 defines the OBIS object identification system used to identify COSEM object instances, measured data, abstract data, display codes, and medium-specific data items.
scope: relation between OBIS logical names and COSEM objects
entries.runtime_use: Use this entry to recognize requirements that cite the Blue Book OBIS object identification system or IEC 62056-6-1.

entries.name: Blue Book Part 2 COSEM Interface Classes
entries.definition: DLMS UA Blue Book Part 2 defines COSEM interface classes, including class identifiers, versions, attributes, methods, access semantics, and the relationship between interface classes and OBIS logical names.
entries.runtime_use: Use this entry to recognize requirements that cite the Blue Book COSEM interface class catalogue or IEC 62056-6-2.

entries.name: Bypass
entries.definition: Irregularity or tamper-related condition detected by the meter.

entries.name: Clock
entries.definition: Meter clock and calendar function used for time-based records and tariff periods.

entries.name: COSEM
entries.definition: Object model used with DLMS for representing metering data, configuration, and control functions.

entries.name: Current
entries.definition: Electrical current measurement.

entries.name: Disconnect Control
entries.definition: Meter function for remote or local disconnection and reconnection control.

entries.name: DLMS
entries.definition: Protocol suite used for utility meter data exchange and device management.

entries.name: ECDH
entries.definition: Key agreement method used in DLMS/COSEM security suites.

entries.name: ECDSA
entries.definition: Digital signature algorithm used in DLMS/COSEM security suites.

entries.name: Error
entries.definition: Meter record for exceptional or failed operations.

entries.name: Event
entries.definition: Meter log entry representing occurrence of a defined operational, security, quality, or irregularity event.

entries.name: Firmware Update
entries.definition: Process or object set related to updating meter firmware and recording firmware changes.

entries.name: HDLC
entries.definition: Data link protocol used by some DLMS/COSEM communication profiles.

entries.name: High Level Security
entries.definition: DLMS/COSEM high-level authentication mechanism.

entries.name: IEC 62056
entries.definition: International standard family for electricity metering data exchange, including DLMS/COSEM application layer, OBIS, and interface classes.

entries.name: Load Profile
entries.definition: Time-series profile for measured or calculated quantities over configured intervals.

entries.name: Logical Device
entries.definition: Abstract entity inside a physical meter that exposes functionality through COSEM objects.

entries.name: LoRaWAN
entries.definition: Low-power wide-area network profile sometimes used for remote metering.

entries.name: Low Level Security
entries.definition: DLMS/COSEM low-level authentication mechanism, commonly password-based.

entries.name: LTE CAT-M
entries.definition: Cellular communication technologies and network interface cards used for remote metering.

entries.name: OBIS
entries.definition: Code system used to identify measured quantities and meter data objects.

entries.name: PLC-PRIME
entries.definition: Power-line communication profile for smart metering networks.

entries.name: QEE
entries.definition: Energy or power quality indicators and measurements.

entries.name: Reactive Energy
entries.definition: Measured reactive energy or related reactive quantities.

entries.name: Register
entries.definition: Meter data object used to store measured energy, demand, or related values.

entries.name: RTM 587/2012
entries.definition: Brazilian metrological regulation often referenced for electricity meters.

entries.name: SAP
entries.definition: Service access point identifier for DLMS/COSEM clients and logical devices.

entries.name: Smart Meter
entries.definition: Electricity meter with advanced measurement, communication, event logging, and remote management functions.

entries.name: SMF
entries.definition: Billing measurement system used in regulated electricity metering contexts.

entries.name: Snapshot
entries.definition: Recorded instantaneous or captured values from meter objects.

entries.name: Voltage
entries.definition: Electrical potential measurement, often phase or line related.

entries.name: Wi-SUN
entries.definition: Wireless communication profile used in smart utility networks.

entries.name: Association LN
entries.definition: COSEM object representing the current logical-name association, including object list, partners, context, authentication, and security setup references.

entries.name: Billing Profile
entries.definition: Profile and object group for storing energy and demand quantities used for billing periods.

entries.name: Blue Book Interface Class Catalogue
entries.definition: The Blue Book Part 2 interface class catalogue groups COSEM interface classes by purpose, including measurement data, access control, time and event control, payment, communication profile setup, Internet setup, PLC setup, ZigBee, Wi-SUN, and relation to OBIS objects.

entries.name: COSEM Access Rights Model
entries.definition: Model for defining whether each client role can read attributes, write attributes, or invoke methods on COSEM objects.

client_columns.meaning: service/local or specialized client depending on table context

entries.name: COSEM Logical Device Name
entries.definition: COSEM data object containing the unique logical device identification.

entries.name: COSEM Object Model
entries.definition: COSEM objects are instances of interface classes identified by logical names and defined by attributes, methods, access rights, and data types.

entries.name: Device ID 1
entries.definition: COSEM data object containing the electronic meter serial number.

entries.name: Disconnect Control Scheduler
entries.definition: COSEM schedule object used to trigger disconnect and reconnect scripts.

key_attributes.name: executed_script
key_attributes.meaning: script identifier for disconnect or reconnect

entries.name: DLMS/COSEM Communication Profiles
entries.definition: Communication profiles considered for the DLMS/COSEM smart meter profile.

profiles.name: HDLC
profiles.medium: data link / serial or IP-related DLMS profile context

entries.name: DLMS/COSEM Security Suites
entries.definition: Available DLMS/COSEM cryptographic suites and related algorithms.

entries.name: DLMS/COSEM Smart Meter Profile
entries.definition: Application and object profile for smart electricity meters using DLMS/COSEM services and COSEM objects.

entries.name: Event Group and Subgroup Model
entries.definition: Event model that classifies logs by group number, subgroup number, event number, and event description.

entries.name: High Level Security Association
entries.definition: Association security level using high-level authentication for management and measurement access.

entries.name: Image Transfer
entries.definition: COSEM object allowing firmware image transfer to COSEM servers.

entries.name: Load Profile
entries.definition: Time-series profile for load curve records and related measurement quantities.

entries.name: Local and Remote Association Matrix
entries.definition: Association matrix that maps client roles to management and metering logical devices and their required security level.

entries.name: Local Management and Measurement Client
entries.definition: Client role used for local access by a concentrator, collector, or central system. It generally has similar rights to the remote management client, with restrictions on remote association attributes.

entries.name: Low Level Security Association
entries.definition: Association security level typically using password-based authentication for read access.

entries.name: Management Logical Device
entries.definition: Mandatory logical device in a physical meter that exposes device management information, structure discovery, configuration, events, alarms, firmware update, and security-related objects.

entries.name: Metering Logical Device
entries.definition: Logical device that exposes the meter's measurement and billing functionality through COSEM objects.

entries.name: OBIS Logical Name
entries.definition: Logical name used to identify COSEM object instances, commonly represented as six OBIS value groups.

entries.name: OBIS Value Groups
entries.definition: OBIS logical names use six value groups in the A-B:C.D.E.F structure. The groups identify media, channels, data items, processing or classification, tariff or further processing, and historical or billing period allocation.

groups.meaning: Media or energy type; A=0 is abstract, A=1 AC electricity, A=2 DC electricity, A=4 heat cost allocator, A=5/6 thermal energy, A=7 gas, A=8 cold water, A=9 hot water.
Measurement or communication channel; B=0 means no channel specified, B=1..64 channel numbers.
Abstract or physical data item such as current, voltage, power, volume, temperature, list object, or data profile object.
Type, result of processing, or further classification for the item identified by A to C.
Tariff rate or other further classification, depending on the medium-specific object family.
Billing period, historical value, or other storage instance allocation.

standard_ranges.manufacturer_specific: Selected ranges such as 128..199 or 128..254 depending on value group and context.

entries.name: Power Quality Profile
entries.definition: Object and quantity group for power quality measurements and indicators.

entries.name: Public Client
entries.definition: Client role used to reveal the structure of an unknown metering device, typically through the management logical device without security.
limitations: No access to measurement data requiring authentication
No read or write access to password values

entries.name: Read Client
entries.definition: Client role used for reading parameters and energy data. Password access through LLS is typically required.
limitations: No read or write access to password values

entries.name: Remote Management and Measurement Client
entries.definition: Client role used by data concentrators, collectors, or central systems for remote point-to-point access to management and measurement functions.

entries.name: SAP Assignment
entries.definition: COSEM object listing logical devices and their SAP assignments.

entries.name: Security Policy Bit Map
entries.definition: Bit-level meaning of DLMS/COSEM security policy states.

bits.meaning: not used, must be set to 0
not used, must be set to 0

entries.name: Security Policy State Map
keywords: all messages are authenticated and encrypted
entries.definition: State-level map for DLMS/COSEM message authentication and encryption policy.

states.meaning: all messages are authenticated and encrypted

entries.definition: Service set used by DLMS/COSEM clients to read, write, invoke methods, receive events, and receive pushed data.

entries.name: Compact Data
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for compact storage and transfer of captured values using a template description and compact buffer representation.
behavior_notes: capture_objects lists the COSEM object attributes captured into compact_buffer.
template_id and template_description let a client reconstruct uncompacted attribute descriptors, data types, and values.
The template_id attribute shall be the first element in capture_objects.
Relative and absolute selective access mechanisms are mutually exclusive for captured Profile generic buffers.

entries.definition: Generic COSEM interface class for a single data value.

attributes.name: logical_name
attributes.meaning: OBIS logical name of the object

access_semantics: The value data type is determined by the object instance logical_name and must be chosen so the value can be interpreted unambiguously.

entries.name: Demand Register
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for demand values based on averaging periods.
behavior_notes: current_average_value is the running demand over the current averaging interval.
last_average_value is calculated over the previous number_of_periods multiplied by period interval.
period and number_of_periods define the demand calculation interval.

entries.name: Disconnect Control
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for disconnect/reconnect control.

state_model.control_mode_note: control_mode configures which remote, manual, and local transitions are allowed.

behavior_notes: remote_disconnect forces the object into Disconnected when remote disconnection is enabled.
remote_reconnect either reconnects directly or moves to Ready_for_reconnection depending on control_mode.
The object has no command memory; commands are executed immediately.

entries.definition: COSEM register with status and capture time in addition to value and scaler/unit.

reset sets value to the instance-specific default and sets capture_time to the reset execution time.

over-threshold and under-threshold actions are executed only after the configured minimum duration is exceeded.

entries.name: Profile Generic
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for storing captured entries such as load profiles, billing profiles, event logs, and alarm/error logs.
behavior_notes: capture_objects defines the attributes copied into the buffer by automatic capture or the capture method.
Changing capture_objects clears the buffer so all entries remain homogeneous.
capture_period 0 means no automatic capture; values >= 1 define automatic capture period in seconds.

entries.name: Push Setup
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for configuring push operations, including the objects to push, destination and transport method, communication windows, retry behavior, and repetition delay.
behavior_notes: push_object_list defines the COSEM object attributes sent when push is invoked.
Push is sent using the DataNotification service when configured trigger conditions are met.
communication_window, randomisation_start_interval, number_of_retries, and repetition_delay define delayed execution and retry behavior.
push_protection_parameters define data protection options for pushed data.

entries.name: Register Activation
entries.definition: COSEM class used to define active register masks and register assignments.

entries.name: Register Table
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for representing register values in a table-oriented structure, typically used where related measured values are arranged as rows and columns.

methods.name: reset
methods.meaning: Clear table_cell_values without changing captured attributes

methods.name: capture
methods.meaning: Copy configured attribute values into table_cell_values

behavior_notes: table_cell_definition defines the common class_id, logical_name wildcard, group_E_values, and attribute_index for captured attributes.
Changing table_cell_definition automatically resets table_cell_values and propagates to profiles that capture this object.
When capturing Register or Extended register value attributes, scaler_unit is common for all objects and holds a copy.

entries.name: Register
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for a measured value with scaler and unit.

common_instances.name: Time threshold for long power failure

access_semantics: A Register models a process or status value together with its associated scaler and unit; the logical_name identifies the nature of the value.

entries.name: Single Action Schedule
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for scheduling one or more script executions at defined times.

entries.name: Script Table
entries.definition: COSEM class containing executable scripts, each composed of action specifications.

entries.name: Security Setup
entries.definition: COSEM interface class for security policy, security suite, system titles, certificates, and key management methods.

common_instances.name: Security Setup for remote client association
Security Setup for local client association

access_semantics: Instances contain the security suite and policy applicable between a client and server identified by their system titles.
The class provides methods to increase security level and manage symmetric keys, asymmetric key pairs, and certificates.
